title: P10 production baseline audit v2
objective:
Run script:
"""
report = Path('governance/reports/bem526_p10_baseline_audit.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem526_p10_baseline_audit_v2.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

workflow_files = []
workflow_dir = Path('.github/workflows')
if workflow_dir.exists():
    for f in workflow_dir.iterdir():
        if f.suffix in ['.yml', '.yaml']:
            workflow_files.append(f)
workflow_files = sorted(workflow_files, key=lambda x: str(x))
workflow_summary = []
schedule_hits = []
for wf in workflow_files:
    text = wf.read_text(errors='ignore')
    has_schedule = 'schedule:' in text
    has_dispatch = 'workflow_dispatch' in text
    workflow_summary.append('- ' + str(wf) + ': workflow_dispatch=' + str(has_dispatch) + ', schedule=' + str(has_schedule))
    if has_schedule:
        schedule_hits.append(str(wf))

codex = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
codex_text = codex.read_text(errors='ignore') if codex.exists() else ''
checks = {}
checks['codex_runner_exists'] = codex.exists()
checks['codex_runner_ubuntu_latest'] = 'runs-on: ubuntu-latest' in codex_text
checks['codex_runner_python_executor'] = ('Python executor' in codex_text) or ('python3' in codex_text)
checks['codex_runner_no_codex_cli'] = 'codex exec' not in codex_text
checks['codex_runner_no_openai_api_key'] = 'OPENAI_API_KEY' not in codex_text
checks['no_schedule_triggers'] = len(schedule_hits) == 0

state_path = Path('governance/state/roadmap_state.json')
state = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}
current_phase = state.get('current_phase')
phase_title = state.get('phase_title')
blocker = state.get('blocker')

all_checks = True
for v in checks.values():
    if not v:
        all_checks = False
status = 'PASS' if all_checks and current_phase == 'P10' and blocker is None else 'BLOCKER'

report.write_text('# BEM-526 | P10 Production Stability Baseline Audit | ' + status + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 11:48 (UTC+3)\n\n## Проверки\n- current_phase: ' + str(current_phase) + '\n- phase_title: ' + str(phase_title) + '\n- blocker: ' + str(blocker) + '\n- codex_runner_exists: ' + str(checks['codex_runner_exists']) + '\n- codex_runner_ubuntu_latest: ' + str(checks['codex_runner_ubuntu_latest']) + '\n- codex_runner_python_executor: ' + str(checks['codex_runner_python_executor']) + '\n- codex_runner_no_codex_cli: ' + str(checks['codex_runner_no_codex_cli']) + '\n- codex_runner_no_openai_api_key: ' + str(checks['codex_runner_no_openai_api_key']) + '\n- no_schedule_triggers: ' + str(checks['no_schedule_triggers']) + '\n\n## Workflows\n' + '\n'.join(workflow_summary) + '\n\n## Schedule hits\n' + str(schedule_hits) + '\n\n## Итог\nP10 baseline audit status: ' + status + '.\nExecutor policy: free ubuntu-latest Python executor, no paid OpenAI API.\nNo issue comments. No schedule triggers.\n')

proof.write_text('BEM-526 P10 baseline audit ' + status + '. current_phase=' + str(current_phase) + '. no_schedule_triggers=' + str(checks['no_schedule_triggers']) + '. codex_runner_ubuntu_latest=' + str(checks['codex_runner_ubuntu_latest']) + '. python_executor=' + str(checks['codex_runner_python_executor']) + '. no_paid_api=' + str(checks['codex_runner_no_openai_api_key']) + '.\n')

changed_files.extend([str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('P10 production stability baseline audit completed with status ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
